name: Supabase
description: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative that provides a full backend platform built on PostgreSQL. It offers a RESTful API (via PostgREST) for database CRUD operations, authentication, file storage, edge functions, and real-time subscriptions -- all auto-generated from your database schema.

capabilities.name: query_rows
capabilities.description: Read rows from any table in your Supabase database with filtering, sorting, pagination, and column selection. Supports complex filters, full-text search, and relational joins through foreign key references.

capabilities.name: insert_rows
capabilities.description: Insert one or more rows into a database table. Supports upserts (insert or update on conflict), returning the inserted data, and bulk inserts for efficient data loading.

capabilities.name: update_rows
capabilities.description: Update existing rows in a table that match filter conditions. Supports partial updates, returning modified rows, and conditional updates with complex filter expressions.

capabilities.name: delete_rows
capabilities.description: Delete rows from a table that match filter conditions. Returns the deleted rows if requested. Always requires a filter to prevent accidental full-table deletion.

capabilities.name: call_function
capabilities.description: Invoke a PostgreSQL function (stored procedure) through the REST API. Useful for complex operations, transactions, or business logic that lives in the database layer.

capabilities.name: manage_storage
capabilities.description: Upload, download, list, move, and delete files in Supabase Storage buckets. Supports generating signed URLs for temporary access and managing bucket-level configurations.
